# Danilo Díaz Tarascó

> CTO & Electronic Engineer at Sento IoT+Electronics Hub, Medellín, Colombia

## About

Danilo Díaz Tarascó is a Chief Technology Officer and Electronic Engineer based in Medellín, Antioquia, Colombia. He holds Spanish (EU citizen), Venezuelan citizenship and has 10+ years of professional experience across 5 countries (Colombia, Venezuela, Mexico, USA, Canada). He is a permanent resident in Colombia since 2019.

He is currently CTO at Sento IoT+Electronics Hub, where he leads a 12-engineer team defining technical vision and product roadmap for the IIoT portfolio — achieving 99.9% uptime. He drove the company from negative to positive EBITDA with ~60% revenue growth over three years. He expanded into maritime cargo tracking, chemical dosing systems, and precision agriculture. He integrates AI tooling (Claude Code, Codex) to maximize lean-team output.

## Education

- Master's in Electronics, Mechatronics and Power Electronics — Universidad Simón Bolívar (2020–2026)
- Electronic Engineering Degree — Universidad Simón Bolívar (2010–2016)

## Professional Experience

- **CTO** — Sento IoT+Electronics Hub, Colombia (2024–Present)
- **Sr. Electronics Engineer Team Lead** — Sento IoT+Electronics Hub, Colombia (2023–2024)
- **Software Engineer** — PowDevs / Blackline Safety, USA/Canada (2021–2022)
- **Development Engineer** — Sento IoT+Electronics Hub, Colombia (2019–2021)
- **Hardware Engineer** — Innavitas SAPI - Wiot, Mexico (Remote) (2016–2019)
- **Component Specialist** — Altium, Canada (2018–2019)

## Core Expertise

- Cloud IoT / Industrial IoT (IIoT)
- Power Electronics (switching supplies, DC-DC converters)
- PCB Design & Manufacturing (Altium Designer, IPC, FCC compliance)
- Mechatronics (Fusion 360, SolidWorks, ROVs, embedded systems)
- Software Engineering (Serverless, AWS, Python, Infrastructure as Code)
- AI-augmented Development (Claude Code, Codex)
- Technical Leadership (Scrum, cross-functional teams, strategic planning)

## Awards & Certifications

- 1st Place IEEE Open Category at CCSBOTS 2013
- Latin American Robotics Competition participant (Team "Giatronica")
- Mención Honorífica — ROV Telemetry System Thesis
- AWS Fundamentals: Going Cloud-Native
- AWS Fundamentals: Addressing Security Risk
- SQL Intermediate Certificate
- AI Proficiency
- Advanced Prompting Techniques
- Working with Reasoning Models
- Building a Custom GPT

## Languages

- Spanish (Native)
- English (Full Professional)

- OpenAI Document Analyzer (open-source, 40+ stars)
- Altium Component Library (open-source, 21+ stars)
- GW Standalone — Industrial IoT Gateway
- Pycom OTA WiFi — OTA firmware updates for Pycom devices
- OTA App AWS — Serverless OTA management platform
- OTA Amplify Manager — AWS Amplify OTA management app
- PigVision 2.0 — Computer vision for livestock monitoring
